frame_validator.h(3) Library Functions Manual frame_validator.h(3)

NAME

frame_validator.h - Frame validation utilities for IMAGE_FRAME packets.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define FRAME_HEADER_SIZE_LEGACY 8
Legacy frame header size (width:4 + height:4). #define FRAME_HEADER_SIZE_NEW 16
New frame header size (width:4 + height:4 + compressed:4 + size:4). #define FRAME_HEADER_FIELD_SIZE 4
Size of each header field (uint32_t = 4 bytes).

Functions


asciichat_error_t frame_validate_legacy (size_t len, size_t expected_rgb_size)
Validate legacy frame format. asciichat_error_t frame_validate_new (void *data, size_t len, bool *out_compressed, uint32_t *out_data_size)
Validate new frame format with optional compression. asciichat_error_t frame_check_size_overflow (size_t header_size, size_t data_size)
Check for overflow when adding header to data. void frame_extract_dimensions (const void *data, uint32_t *width, uint32_t *height)
Extract width and height from frame header. void frame_extract_new_header (const void *data, uint32_t *compressed, uint32_t *data_size)
Extract compressed flag and data size from new format header.

Detailed Description

Frame validation utilities for IMAGE_FRAME packets.

Definition in file network/frame_validator.h.
